description: Perform a quantitative analysis of spinal canal stenosis on the 'T1 Head' MRI dataset. Segment the spinal canal on slices 10 through 19 and measure the cross-sectional area for each slice. Export a CSV file containing 'Slice_ID' and 'Area' for these measurements to ~/Fiji_Data/results/stenosis/canal_measurements.csv. Identify the slice with the smallest area (maximum stenosis) and record the slice number in ~/Fiji_Data/results/stenosis/diagnosis.txt. Save a screenshot showing the segmentation of the narrowest slice to ~/Fiji_Data/results/stenosis/segmentation_evidence.png.
